authority: This file is the single source of truth for numbers (GR-1). No metric appears in prose except as a citation of this file. Keystone-only writes.

objective.gate: tools/lexon_check.mjs full pass on every proposed LEXICON entry, plus 5 held-out census terms expressed by the assayer using only the proposal's pattern recipe, plus 3 covered regression entries; gateResult 8/8 (T5: zero collapses). Regime: spec-checker (real Lexon compiler is macOS-only, source unpublished; see SOURCES.md lexon-compiler-status).
objective.hardConstraint: every entry cites a SOURCES.md slug (GR-9 trace-or-delete); register discipline proven/conjectured/speculative never upgraded; no em dashes in artifact/; no C-series numbers or confidence percentages from any seat (GR-3)

baseline.how: node tools/census.mjs --freeze (rule pinned in artifact/CENSUS.json and tools/census.mjs EXCLUSIONS); coverage-debt re-derived by node tools/coverage.mjs against artifact/LEXICON.lexon.md

best.evidence: run lexr1 2026-07-10 (wf_931560d2-9c6, status INCOMPLETE: rounds 1-2 complete, round 3 lost to session-limit outage, engine reported outage not exhaustion): 4 levers VALIDATED 8/8, 0 MIRAGE, 0 BLOCKED. Keystone fold: 15 unique proposal entries (T-014..023 block, T-029, T-047, T-050, T-151, T-207; overlaps T-014,016,017,019,020,021,022,023 reconciled across levers) + 5 assayer-authored held-out entries from defined-predicate-charter (T-012, T-048, T-090, T-122, T-174; critic-verified recipe transfer). node tools/coverage.mjs = 181, 30 covered, 0 failed. Verdicts in runs/lexr1/*/; critic vacuity-watch adopted into LEXICON entry rules.

openTarget.statement: quantitative-register stress test (critic nextLead, lexr1): next lever must target ONLY formula/quantitative/spatial census terms (value formulas, Trust (0-1) mappings, mana axes) with the Gap drawing held-out terms from that same register; tests whether coverage-debt falls where numbers are load-bearing instead of re-proving recipes on glossary ground. OT-1 (first VALIDATED loop lever) CLOSED by lexr1: 4 levers validated.
